title: chore(polly): update bot to latest source
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Polly learns Rust
gist.blurb: Our resident bot Polly just got a major brain upgrade with a new Rust core. She's now faster at reading code, better at avoiding infinite loops, and ready to help collaborators manage issues.
gist.summary: Updated the Polly bot with a new Rust-based core for faster code indexing, improved system prompts, and new GitHub collaborator permissions.
gist.impact: Discord and GitHub interactions with Polly will be noticeably faster and more reliable, with fewer runaway tool loops.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee mascot getting a technical upgrade, represented by her reading a technical manual or wearing a tiny hard hat, with a retro computer processing code quickly in the background.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, reading a thick book with a gear on the cover. A chunky retro computer monitor in the background displays fast-scrolling lime green (#ecf874) code. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
